differential_diagnoses: Iron deficiency anemia due to chronic gastrointestinal occult blood loss
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Obtain complete blood count and iron studies to evaluate for anemia
Perform a repeat transthoracic echocardiogram to re-evaluate aortic valve hemodynamics
Schedule a gastroenterology consultation for colonoscopy and occult blood screening
Evaluate for valvular intervention (TAVR) based on repeat echo and functional status
Perform pulmonary function tests to rule out restrictive or obstructive lung disease
